title: Supreme Court to deploy AI to end human role in case listing, bench allocation
description: In a move that could mark a significant change in the functioning of the Supreme Court's administrative side, software powered by Artificial Intelligence (AI) will take over case listing and bench allocation in the top court effectively removing human intervention in the process. The decision was taken by Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant, highly placed sources told Bar & Bench.
